data.title: 诗乃的战斗通行证 S1
data.summary: 🔹 Event ScheduleBattle Pass Schedule: 12/16 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/13/2026 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)B
data.body:
🔹 Event Schedule

- Battle Pass Schedule: 12/16 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/13/2026 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

- Battle Pass Product Purchase Schedule: 12/16 (Tue) After Maintenance – 1/13/2026 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

- Unclaimed Reward Delivery Period: 1/13/2026 (Tue) 2:00 AM – 1/20/2026 (Tue) 1:59 AM (UTC)

! Please note that you cannot activate the Battle Pass or claim its rewards after its period ends.

! The Battle Pass products (Growth CH, Growth CH+) in your mailbox will expire immediately upon claiming when the Battle Pass Task period ends.

! Battle Pass Tasks cannot be completed during the Unclaimed Reward Delivery Period after the end of Battle Pass Season.

* Log in during the Unclaimed Reward Delivery Period to receive unclaimed Battle Pass rewards in your mailbox. (Mailbox Storage Date: 7 days, 1 per account)

 

🔹 Event Details

- Shinon's Battle Pass consists of reward-related menus like Basic CH, Growth CH, Unlock Growth CH, and Tasks.

- For the Basic CH and Growth CH, earn Battle Pass points

and use the Claim All button to claim rewards whenever you reach a specific Battle Pass level.

* Growth CH rewards can only be claimed after unlocking them through "Unlock Growth CH (paid purchase)."

* Each Battle Pass level can be purchased for 100 Pyroxenes.

* Please check in-game for further details.

![image2025121515095528.jpeg](https://kivo.wiki/files/4417/YTYhbj27HKmDVpTSAprn23ZFTqLPxrit.jpg)
